docs.title: Knocking's personal notebook
docs.text:
This is Knockning's personal notebook.

这里是Knocking的个人笔记本.

Please "Ctrl+F5" to update newest notes.

docs.title: About this notebook
docs.text:
[Deprecated] Everytime when you write a new note... The following two lines are integrated into Github workflows and sync.sh... 

mkdocs build
mkdocs gh-deploy
git add --all
git commit -m "blablabla"
git push   # add "-u origin main" for the first push

[Up to date] Just run: 

./sync.sh

To preview the notebook locally... 

mkdocs build
mkdocs serve

docs.title: Commands
docs.text:
• mkdocs new [dir-name] - Create a new project.
  • mkdocs serve - Start the live-reloading docs server.
  • mkdocs build - Build the documentation site.
  • mkdocs -h - Print help message and exit.

docs.title: Project layout
docs.text:
mkdocs.yml    # The configuration file.
docs/
    index.md  # The documentation homepage.
    ...       # Other markdown pages, images and other files.

docs.title: Domains
docs.text:
Buy and manage domains on namesilo. After buying a domain, go to "manage domains" in namesilo:

  1. Add "A" records and set Github ip:

    185.199.108.153
185.199.109.153
185.199.110.153
185.199.111.153

  2. Add "CNAME" records, set sub-domain, and set address to username.github.io

  3. Go to "Github repository - Settings - Pages - Custom domain". Input your domain and click "save".

    NOTICE: It may take minutes to hours for the DNS server to refresh.

    After DNS checked successfully, do not forget to click "Enforce HTTPS" box.

docs.title: Create a new github repository
docs.text:
Create a new repository

echo "# notes" >> README.md
git init
git add README.md
git commit -m "first commit"
git branch -M main
git remote add origin git@github.com:{MyName}/{RepoName}.git
git push -u origin main

Push an existing repo with command lines

git remote add origin git@github.com:{MyName}/{RepoName}.git
git branch -M main
git push -u origin main

docs.title: Paper notes
docs.text:
• SuperPrimitive: Scene Reconstruction at a Primitive Level

    语义（实例）+重建。同时做分割+法向估计。展示了稠密重建、稠密VO。

  • RIGA: Rotation-Invariant and Globally-Aware Descriptors for Point Cloud Registration

    3d point cloud registration. Use rotation-invariant PPF(sec3.2).
